steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
The Jewel of Amnâd can be found in Máttugard. You should find a way to get to the Jewel of Amnâd.
The Jewel of Amnâd can be found in Máttugard. You should collect the Jewel of Amnâd.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Amnâd to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver…
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
